description: UK healthtech providing patient engagement platform for NHS trusts. Handles 150M+ patient messages annually for appointments, reminders, and care coordination. Deep NHS integration.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to NHS trusts and healthcare organizations
target_market: NHS trusts, hospitals, and healthcare providers in UK
competitive_advantage: Deep NHS integration, trust-level deployment, proven scale

varden_fit.rationale: Infrastructure layer in NHS - potential integration partner for patient communication
